evaluators.name: Two Cheapest 2-Player Basketball Machines Quote Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user added the two cheapest qualifying 2-player basketball machines under $8,000 to a quote list and submitted a quote request for that list.

evaluators.name: Mixed-Category Compact 110V Project List Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a project containing one qualifying machine from each required category (racing, ticket redemption, prize crane, air hockey), all 110V and ≤130 cm wide, and ideally saved that project.

evaluators.name: Newest Crane Installation Manual Download Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user searched for installation manuals and downloaded the newest installation manual (published ≥2023) for any prize crane/merchandiser model.

evaluators.name: Air Hockey On-Site Maintenance Request Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted an on-site maintenance service request for an air hockey table with a June 2026 10:00 time and a goal/score detection issue description.

evaluators.name: Berlin Distributor Claw Machine Inquiry Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user contacted an authorized Berlin, Germany distributor with a product inquiry about claw machine pricing and availability for a new arcade.

evaluators.name: Upcoming Trade Show Demo Slot Booking Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user booked a 15-minute demo at 2:00 PM on the earliest day of the earliest upcoming trade show event that offers on-site demos.

evaluators.name: Lower Monthly Payment Financing Plan Selection Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user submitted a financing inquiry for equipment under $20,000 where the selected 48-month USD plan has a lower monthly payment than the 36-month USD plan for the same price, and that the stored estimate matches the calculated payment.

evaluators.name: Newsletter Subscription Segments and Frequency Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the user created a newsletter subscription selecting ONLY Family Entertainment Centers and Bowling Centers segments with a monthly email frequency and accepted the privacy policy, with a plausible name and email.
